# INTENT

## User Request

Allow project owners to order uploaded images with drag and drop so the public page displays them in that same order.

## Requested Outcome

Saved images can be rearranged in the project editor and persisted when saving.

## Constraints

- Focus on already saved images for this pass.
- Use existing `sort_order` data model.
- Keep public page rendering behavior otherwise unchanged.

## Open Questions

- None.
